title: Rising in Victory
description:
Christ Jesus has overcome the world and deprived it of power to harm us. By this, we have been empowered to rise above challenges and tribulations. However, to experience this consistently, it is important that we meditate on and interact with God’s word.

In this message, “Rising in Victory,” Pastor Tara reveals how to take full advantage of God’s word and activate its power in our lives. He shares five precise and practical actions that position us to experience supernatural results and rise above every challenge with undeniable victory.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith to Command Resources
description:
By faith, every believer can experience dominion in all aspects of life. By it, believers can reproduce great wealth, taking control of resources for the propagation of the gospel, the development of nations, and personal growth.

In this Prophetic Lifting & Communion Service message, Faith to Command Resources, Pastor Tara reveals the know-how to activate the creative power of faith for the production of kingdom wealth, launching us into active fulfilment of prophecies.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Reaping in Mercy
description:
For God’s power to produce tangible results in our lives, our hearts must be rightly prepared to receive the harvest His power brings. This is because the heart is the ground where miracles are conceived and manifested

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service message, “Reaping in Mercy,” Pastor Tara teaches how the posture of our heart is important in experiencing God’s harvest. Through prayer and prophetic declarations, we are positioned to reap a harvest of remembrance, recommendation, supernatural operations, favour, healing, financial breakthroughs, and open doors.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Taking Over
description:
As believers, we have express access to rule, reign and have global impact in every sphere of life. And, for this to be fleshed out tangibly in our lives, we must walk in the knowledge of our identity in Christ, prioritise prayers and adhere to instructions.

In this Life of Victory Service message titled, “Taking Over”, Pastor Tara expatiates on how identity, incense and instructions work to catapult believers into kingship and rulership on Earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Explosions of God’s Power
description:
God has destined for His kingdom to reign on earth through the believer. And, by reason of our new birth in Christ, we have been empowered to be carriers and conduits of God’s power. As such, we are authorised to deploy God’s power to command supernatural results in every aspect of life.

In this Testimony, Prophetic and Communion service message, “Explosions of God’s Power”, Pastor Tara unveils four pathways that cause believers to become living expressions of God’s authority, carrying tangible proofs of His Kingdom across generations.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Dominion through The Word
description:
The Word of God is the believer’s creative capital and source of perpetual victory in life. By actively applying it to our endeavours, we position ourselves for a life of dominion — breaking free from demonic attacks and negative patterns to command authority over our health, finances, and the systems of the earth.

In this Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Dominion Through the Word,” Pastor Tara reveals the profound step to unlocking the supernatural life the believer has been redeemed for and, through prophetic declarations, moves us from potential into undeniable manifestation.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Fire-Imparting Power of God’s Word
description:
The believer is ordained to influence generations with the gospel. To equip us to do this, God has given us His Word, the ministry of the sent one, and the gift of prayer.

In this Life of Victory Service message titled, “The Fire-Imparting Power of God’s Word”, Pastor Tara, with great utterance and power shows how these three set us up for great impact in the sectors and on the earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Building Structures for Supernatural Explosion
description:
The manifestation of God’s power and the encounters we experience happen in direct proportion to the capacity and structures we prepare. Therefore, we must intentionally create room for God’s power to be expressed maximally, as this positions us to experience supernatural abundance.

In this Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Building Structures for Supernatural Explosion,” Pastor Tara teaches how consistent giving, supplication, and bold actions of faith are structures through which the power of God is released for explosions of prosperity in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Forces of Lifting
description:
We are guaranteed continuous victory in life because God is always with us. To experience this victory, however, there are divine instruments of lifting that God has positioned — that we must also take advantage of — to move us beyond barriers, usher us into blessings, and propel us to higher levels of victory.

In this prophetic message, “The Forces of Lifting,” Pastor Tara teaches how the ministry of angels, the power of testimonies, and the force of declarations work together to bring supernatural acceleration, divine help, and miraculous turnarounds in every area of our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Growing to Impact Generations
description:
The growth and impact of the church depend on every believer answering the call to share the Gospel and play their predestined roles both in the body of Christ and in their generation. However, to adequately fulfil this call, God’s people must be equipped with His Word and power.

In this message, “Growing to Impact Generations,” from the first Prophetic Lifting & Communion Service of the year, Pastor Tara Akinkuade emphasises God’s word, gift and mandate as the core essentials through which believers can grow to impact their generation. With much utterance and great power, he launches us into a year of impact and influence in our sectors and the world.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Operative Power of God’s Word
description:
God desires that every believer lives in the supernatural as their natural estate. He desires that we cast out devils, speak with new tongues, and manifest the workings of the Spirit without restraints, as Jesus would have if He were on earth.

In this Life of Victory Service message, “The Operative Power of God’s Word,” Pastor Tara reveals three ways God’s Word causes us to live in the supernatural, setting us up for lives filled with possibilities and the manifest presence of God.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Climbing the Throne of Greatness
description:
When God wants to lift us, He does it through encounters—whether through His Word or through His prophets. These moments open our eyes to new possibilities, release fresh wisdom, and ignite the drive that propels us into greatness.

In this Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Climbing the Throne of Greatness,” Pastor Tara teaches three transformative principles we should apply after receiving encounters to rise into the life God has prepared for us. Walking in these principles will set us up to experience remarkable breakthroughs and outstanding testimonies.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Empowering Power of God’s Word
description:
God’s Word has the power to transform anybody into an individual who confounds the world with undeniable proofs of God’s power. When the Word of God is received and applied, it produces visible results that showcase the power of God at work in a man.

In this recent Life of Victory service message titled ‘‘The Empowering Power of God’s Word’’, Pastor Tara shows how God’s Word empowers believers to live victoriously and exert influence on the earth, setting us up to exercise dominion.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Prophetic Power of God’s Word
description:
Scriptures are the living breath of God, able to impart strength, release the forces of the supernatural, and transform the life of anyone who believes them. When approached with expectation and trust in its authenticity, the Word of God becomes an encounter that breaks limits and lifts destinies.

In this Testimony, Prophetic and Communion Service message, “The Prophetic Power of God’s Word,” Pastor Tara reveals how God’s Word is a force that shifts our lives upward. With mighty utterance, he expounds on how encounters with Scriptures bring revelation, direction, conquest in warfare and causes impartation of graces in the life of the believer.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Great Kingdom Harvest
description:
The mindset we approach kingdom mandates with matters. We can choose to see God’s work as a difficult, uphill task, or we can recognise that the world is already prepared and ready for harvest. What is required from us is spiritual power — through which God’s will takes root and prevails in the lives of people and systems.

In this message from the 21 days of The Blessing of Dominion, “Great Kingdom Harvest,” Pastor Tara Akinkuade shows how the power of God equips us with strength, wisdom, spiritual authority, and the ability to reach a generation and establish the values and culture of God’s kingdom on earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Great Wealth
description:
Great wealth does not come with passivity or double-mindedness. It requires intentional commitment, clarity, and consistency on the path God sets us on, alongside a conviction of the truth that God is generous and responsive to those who call upon Him.

In this message from the 21 Days of the Blessing of Dominion, titled “Great Wealth,” Pastor Tara shares three essential principles that we must actively apply to step into colossal wealth and live in the fullness of God’s provision.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Inheriting Lands
description:
God’s system for transferring wealth to His children and installing them in places of power is not built on human intelligence, effort, or strength. It is based on a covenant that has already been established and guaranteed by Jesus.

In this message from the 21 Days of the Blessing of Dominion, titled “Inheriting Lands,” Pastor Tara explains three supernatural principles of takeover that believers must understand and apply in order to walk in dominion and take possession of territories God has committed to them.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Triumphing in the Darkest Places of the Earth
description:
The world is filled with the complex interplay of man’s influence, competitiveness and schemes but, the believer must triumph, lead and have an indelible impact for the glory of God’s kingdom despite these. Breaking through the enchantments, influence and effects of the forces in the system to triumph requires deliberateness and warfare on our part.

In this 21 Days of The Blessing of Dominion message, “Triumphing in the Darkest Places of the Earth,” Pastor Tara expounds on practical steps to triumph and emerge victorious no matter where we find ourselves.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Exploding in Miracles
description:
Our victory over daunting situations and difficult experiences is assured. However, this victory does not come from human intelligence, but by consciously exercising our God-given authority and rising with the power of God to bring miracles to bear in our lives.

In this Heart Enlargement Lagos message, “Exploding in Miracles,” Pastor Tara expounds on three key tools required to walk effortlessly in the manifestations of God’s power: sacrifice, supplication, and spiritual gifts. He further explains how a consistent commitment to these principles leads to perpetual victory in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Maximizing Encounters
description:
When God wants to change the experiences of a man, He sends encounters—through His word, His power and His anointed servants. These encounters of the God-kind must be held on to and maximized by the believer for them to yield results at their highest capacity.

In this recent Dominion Convention message, “Maximizing Encounters”, Pastor Tara Akinkuade shares insights and wisdom on what we should do to see the full manifestation of the effects of encounters in our lives, equipping us to hold on to God’s promises to us and see them produce at full capacity this year.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Stretching in Prayer 2
description:
Prayer is the channel through which we partner with Christ for the manifestations of His work on Earth. Through prayer, earthly systems are influenced and altered, purpose is ignited within us and we lay hold on substantial victories in our lives.

In this Life of Victory Service message, “Stretching in Prayers II,” Pastor Tara Akinkuade teaches further on another profound event that occurs when we engage in sustained prayer—specifically, the inception of purpose and transformation—and how these occurrences facilitate miracles and advancement in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breaking Into Exclusive Circles
description:
There are seasons in our lives when access to new doors, rare opportunities, and exclusive spaces brings us to new levels of increase. In moments like these, we need God to grant us favour, visibility, and divine access to fully maximise these seasons in ways that no amount of striving can.

In this Heart Enlargement Lagos message, “Breaking into Exclusive Circles,” Pastor Tara shares a myriad of testimonies that reveal God’s lifting power that has brought many into mighty open doors, while prophetically ushering us into the experience of these same blessings. He further explains four divine realities that must rest upon us to bring us into exclusive circles and cause new levels of testimonies to explode in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Blessing of Dominion – 21 Days of the Blessing of Dominion
description:
When God created man, He blessed him and commanded him to be fruitful, multiply, replenish the earth, and subdue it. Through this blessing, God placed authority in our hands, empowering us to exercise dominion over the earth and all that is in it.

In this message from the 21 Days of The Blessing of Dominion titled, “The Blessing of Dominion,” Pastor Tara teaches the practical expressions of God’s blessing and reveals how we can walk in them to take possession of our spheres, exercise authority, and bring God’s purpose to fruition on the earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Knowledge of Spirituals
description:
God’s will is that we rule with might and be accomplished in destiny. But rulership and dominion the way God intends happens only by the manifest power of God at work within the systems. This makes it necessary for every believer to have adequate knowledge of spiritual truths to walk in sweatless triumphs.

In this message from the 21 Days of the Blessing of Dominion titled, “The Knowledge of Spirituals,” Pastor Tara Akinkuade reveals that revelation and practice, realisation and initiative, as well as recognition and impartation, remain the three core principles of getting the knowledge of spirituals for our profiting.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Stretching in Prayer
description:
Our prayers are vehicles through which God’s purpose and desires for us are manifested on earth. When we pray, God shapes and rearranges the earth, causing us to experience mighty victories in our lives.

In this New Year Service message, “Stretching in Prayers”, Pastor Tara emphasises the need to spend protracted time praying to birth the purposes of God on Earth and to enforce His blessings in our lives. In this teaching, he explains one of the mighty occurrences that happen when we stretch in prayers — awareness and announcement — and how they birth miracles and upliftment in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prophecy for the Year 2026
description:
2026 isOUR YEAR OF THE BLESSING OF DOMINION

Download the prophetic word for the year 2026.

Meditate on the words, pray them out and wage a good warfare with them.

Have a blessed 2026.God bless you.

title: The Blessing of Dominion
description:
When a new year begins, people make plans and set new desires, but what truly defines the year and causes us to experience victory are prophetic words. These words are God’s promises that, when  acted upon, shape our journey, and position us to enjoy new and mightier testimonies.

In this Prophetic Crossover Service message, “The Blessing of Dominion,” Pastor Tara prophetically ushered us into the year 2026 with the Prophetic Word: “We are Walking in the Blessing of Dominion.” He expounds how God will bring us into the manifestation of this word with great power, thereby releasing us into great wealth, positioning us for great kingdom harvests, and causing us to experience dominion throughout the year 2026 and beyond.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Pressing Faith
description:
Faith enables us to receive miracles from God. Yet, many times, before our faith produces the results we desire, we must contend with obstacles. As we rise to confront these challenges, our faith is refined and strengthened, energising us to lay hold on our miracles.

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service message, “Pressing Faith,” Pastor Tara opens our eyes to the obstacles our faith must overcome to receive the miraculous. He identifies the obstacles of denial, the demand to rise above the competition of multitudes and the need to break free from the weight of shame. As we push past these, we position ourselves to receive the miracles God has already prepared for us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Birthing Supernatural Interventions
description:
In a world where limitations threaten to cripple many, the believer is the one with the answers. As believers, we have been endued with power, wisdom, and God’s supplies to bring heaven to bear on earth and transform the course of our lives, our generation and the world around us.

In this “Answers from Heaven” message, Birthing Supernatural Interventions, Pastor Tara Akinkuade shows us how to wield our authority as believers to cause the supernatural to become a daily occurrence. He shows the place of laying hold on our identity, God’s supplies, and kingdom ideals in playing our role as God’s agents of omnipotent change, bringing authority, prosperity and dominion on Earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breaking Out of the Box
description:
God desires that we enjoy unlimited breakthroughs in every aspect of our lives, and He has provided the requisite grace for it. However, to experience this, we must break out from internal and external limitations, charging at life without holding back.

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service “Breaking Out of the Box,” Pastor Tara shows how redundancy, limited resources, and impossibility are boxes that seemingly limit our advancement and teaches how, with divine directions, prophecies spoken over us, and bold actions of faith, we can break away from them.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Kingdom Spread by Influence: A Case Study of The Standing Church II
description:
The Standing Church is an ever-growing move of God that has impacted lives for over a decade. Through careful observation, its growth reveals clear pathways through which transformed lives have become channels that extend the influence of God’s kingdom on earth.

In this second part of the Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Kingdom Spread by Influence: A Case Study of The Standing Church,” Pastor Tara outlines principles from the church’s growth that are pivotal to spreading God’s kingdom in the sectors and our spheres of influence.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Kingdom Spread by Influence: A Case Study of The Standing Church
description:
The Standing Church is an ever-growing move of God that has impacted lives for over ten years. Through careful observation, its growth reveals clear pathways through which transformed lives have become channels that extend the influence of God’s kingdom on earth.

In this Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Kingdom Spread by Influence: A Case Study of The Standing Church,” Pastor Tara outlines principles from the church’s growth that are pivotal to spreading God’s kingdom in the sectors and our spheres of influence.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Making a Difference
description:
The believer is the light of the world. Hence, as believers, our lives and our good works are meant to be seen by all so that many may be drawn to God. When we step out with this intention, God breathes upon our decisions and actions, making them His moves for the kingdom.

In this Prophetic Lifting and Communion Service message, “Making a Difference,” Pastor Tara teaches how we can make a difference and shine our light through praying, looking for and creating opportunities. As we engage these, our light shines brighter, and we become vessels through which God touches the world around us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Rising with the Power of the Spirit
description:
God has mighty plans and purposes for our lives, but they can only be fulfilled with His power. When we rely solely on our strength, our progress can be limited, but when we operate by the power of God, we rise above opposition and step into God’s intended outcomes for our lives.

In this Testimony and Prophetic Service message, “Rising with the Power of the Spirit,” Pastor Tara draws from the life of Moses to reveal three practical pathways through which we can rise with God’s power. These paths position us to wield divine power, equipping us to rise beyond limitations in every of life.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith in the Power of God
description:
To experience unfathomable results in every area of life, you must constantly put your faith in and exercise the power of God, rather than depend solely on your efforts. This is because the power of God is what truly transforms our lives and brings advancement to us.

In this Testimony and Prophetic Service message, “Faith in the Power of God,” Pastor Tara teaches the life-changing principles of deliberately putting our faith in the gospel, the power God has given to us as believers and miracles. As we do this, heaven  rains an abundance that our efforts alone can never acquire.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Only Believe
description:
“Only believe” were the words Jesus spoke to the father who needed his dead daughter brought back to life in Mark 5:36. They are the same words He speaks to us today. The moment unbelief, which is caused by what we see or hear contrary to God’s words, is allowed into our hearts, it becomes the enemy of our faith. Therefore, it must be crushed for our faith to yield at full capacity.

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service message, “Only Believe,” Pastor Tara shows us how to break the grip of unbelief, allowing miracles to multiply unhindered in our lives. Through the Word of God that renews the heart, prayer and fasting that strengthen the spirit, and the choice to step out of environments steeped in unbelief, we learn how to cultivate our faith to move mountains and bring forth miracles.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Rise of Priestly Princes
description:
The advancement of God’s kingdom on earth is tied to our increasing influence. Though the enemy may try to put obstacles in our path, the power of God lifts us beyond every resistance and causes us to rise in influence and impact.

In this powerful message, “The Rise of Priestly Princes,” Pastor Tara reveals how our ascent in life follows the pattern of Jesus, who lived with purpose and passion for the gospel. Drawing from His life, we see that the pathway to rising and advancing the kingdom of God on earth lies in walking in decisiveness, wisdom, as well as stature.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Laying Hold on Prophetic Capital
description:
Through prayers, the company of believers and the ministry of the anointed, God has provided all we need to be strengthened, built up, and propelled forward in life. When we maximise these three, we receive the courage, clarity and stamina needed to move through life unhindered.

In this Testimony and Prophetic Service message, “Laying Hold on Prophetic Capital,” Pastor Tara teaches how to deploy these three powerful channels to receive capital for destiny and enforce the promises of God in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Ascent of the Blessed Man
description:
After God blessed Abraham, he journeyed through three ascending mountains. Each stage came with encounters, but it was Abraham’s responses that propelled his ascent. This journey illustrates how our lives, as believers and heirs of the same promise God spoke over Abraham, should progress when we respond rightly to the blessings of God.

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service message, “The Ascent of a Blessed Man,” Pastor Tara teaches that to fully experience God’s blessings, we must respond rightly to His covenant, honour His anointed, and obey His commands. As we do this, our lives shift to new levels and manifest the fullness of the blessing upon us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Striking Doctrines of Christ
description:
Throughout the books of the gospel, the words and actions of the Lord Jesus transformed lives and provoked wonder. Specifically, in the book of Mark, we see three striking pillars of Christ’s ministry that caused lives to be transformed, oppression broken and miracles birthed.

In this Miracle and Breakthrough Service message, “The Striking Doctrines of Christ,” Pastor Tara reveals these three dimensions of Jesus’ ministry. From the doctrine of teaching that brings understanding, to the doctrine of liberation that breaks bondage, and the doctrine of prayer that commands heaven to move at our call, these doctrines still carry the power to birth miracles in every area of our lives today.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Eating the Good of the Land
description:
All through the Bible, we see God begin the journey of men with blessings—without demands or conditions —just as He did for Adam and Abraham. Understanding this truth strengthens us and positions us to enjoy the goodness of wherever we occupy.

In this Answers From Heaven message, “Eating the Good of the Land,” Pastor Tara shows us how God empowers us to walk confidently into the abundance prepared for us and enjoy the goodness of wherever we occupy.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith in the Blessing
description:
The blessing of God is the power for exploits. The strength and capacity we need to do great things in life do not come from our effort but from understanding and walking in this blessing.

In this Testimony, Prophetic, and Communion Service message, “Faith in the Blessing,” Pastor Tara teaches how we can actively express faith in God’s blessing to see it manifest in our everyday lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Healing from Traumatic Experiences 2
description:
Life’s painful experiences sometimes leave scars that linger deep within and stand as limitations that hinder people from rising. Yet, through the finished work of Jesus, complete healing has been made available. His death did not just redeem our souls; it broke the hold of trauma and restored wholeness to our hearts and bodies.

In this liberating message, “Healing from Traumatic Experiences,” Pastor Tara reveals how God, through His Word, sets us free from embarrassing situations that are determined to hold us down. He teaches how, when we refuse bitterness and choose to see God’s hand even in painful seasons, we experience deep, lasting healing and step into the peace Christ secured for us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Healing from Traumatic Experiences
description:
Life’s painful experiences sometimes leave scars that linger deep within and stand as limitations that hinder people from rising. Yet, through the finished work of Jesus, complete healing has been made available. His death did not just redeem our souls; it broke the hold of trauma and restored wholeness to our hearts and bodies.

In this second part of the liberating message, “Healing from Traumatic Experiences,” Pastor Tara reveals how God, through His Word and power, sets us free from embarrassing illnesses and financial situations — thereby breaking the cycles that try to keep us bound and ushering us into lasting freedom and peace.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Miracles Beyond Human Possibilities
description:
In our journey of faith, we will face moments where the situation before us is completely beyond human ability. In these moments, our response must be to anchor our hearts in God, who specialises in the impossible, drawing encouragement from the testimonies of those whose lives have been transformed by God’s mighty power.

In this Four Sundays of Glory Service message, “Miracles Beyond Human Possibilities,” Pastor Tara shares several mind-blowing encounters and testimonies to strengthen our faith. He affirms that God is ever-committed to transforming our lives and speaks the powerful declarations that trigger this transformation.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Rising by His Appearance
description:
After the resurrection of  Jesus, the book of Mark records three distinct appearances He made. Each appearance carries a profound lesson with the power to lift us, transform us, and position us for higher realms in life.

In this Four Sundays of Glory message, “Rising by His Appearance,” Pastor Tara explains how the three distinct appearances of Jesus to Mary Magdalene, the two men on the road to Emmaus, and the disciples represents a dimension of our lifting into glory through deliverance, spiritual illumination, and deeper understanding of God’s workings.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Receiving of Christ’s Glory
description:
The glory of Jesus is something that we learn of, receive, experience, and grow into. As we behold Christ, His glory rubs off on our lives, reshaping our identity, capacity, and destiny.

In this powerful message, “Receiving of Christ’s Glory,” Pastor Tara unveils three divine expressions of Christ’s glory — miracles, transfiguration and resurrection — that we are called to receive. As we lay hold on these three, we break into the supernatural, rising not only to do great things but to become all we were purposed to be.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Foundations of Greatness
description:
Every man has a desire to be great, to live beyond survival and make a lasting impact. However, true greatness is not built on effort alone. It comes from the blessing of God, which we receive in Christ Jesus.

In this lifting message, “The Foundations of Greatness,” Pastor Tara reveals the divine foundations upon which lasting greatness is built. He teaches that righteousness through Christ, our relationship with God as Father, and the gift of eternal life are the real forces that empower us to rise and live out the greatness already deposited within us by God.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Rising to the Top
description:
True and lasting elevation in life is not produced solely by human effort —it comes by the hand of God. When we understand this truth and approach elevation spiritually, we rise effortlessly into the greatness God has prepared for us.

In this transformative message, “Rising to the Top”, Pastor Tara unveils how God supernaturally lifts us beyond limitations and ushers us into new levels of influence and impact. Through divine repositioning, divine realignment and divine reenergizing, God places us in strategic places and empowers us to keep up spiritual practices — thanksgiving, prayer and giving — that cause us to advance steadily.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Restoration of Fortune
description:
Restoration is God’s supernatural way of bringing back what was lost and making it far greater than it ever was. Just as God restored Job’s life with double abundance, God is still in the business of restoring wasted years, lost opportunities, relationships, wealth, and influence.

In this life-changing message, “Restoration of Fortune,” Pastor Tara shows how God responds when we cry out to Him in heartfelt supplication, and how He begins the process of restoration through three transformative phases that usher us into seasons of multiplied goodness and divine compensation.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prophetic Systems of Supernatural Increase
description:
In Christ, we are destined for greatness and prosperity, and it is God’s will that we keep increasing without end. However, for this increase to find expression, we must understand the systems to put in place and trust God to bless them.

In this powerful message, “Prophetic Systems of Supernatural Increase,” Pastor Tara unveils three vital systems by which we can harness the God-kind of increase: our source in Christ, the release of God’s power, and the systems of study and strength.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: From Candidates of Miracles to Carriers of Graces
description:
God is eternally good, and His goodness is revealed in how He continually works miracles in our lives. But God does not just want us to receive miracles; He desires that we grow from being recipients of His goodness to becoming vessels through which His power flows.

In this powerful message, “From Candidates of Miracles to Carriers of Graces,” Pastor Tara unfolds three stages through which we move in divine operation — from being candidates of miracles, where we receive God’s supernatural intervention; to becoming causative agents, where our declarations birth miracles; and ultimately to becoming carriers of graces, where we command the miraculous and begin to release healing, lifting, and transformation to others.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Commanding Great Acts
description:
Every believer is called to walk in greatness and to take territories for God’s kingdom through great acts. However, we must learn how to command these acts to cause situations to align in our favour and cities to fall into our hands.

In this powerful message, “Commanding Great Acts,” Pastor Tara unveils the place of walking in wisdom, leading courageously and having a conscious understanding of success in commanding great results. He teaches how these three principles position us to rise in authority, take territories, shape outcomes, and manifest undeniable proofs of God’s power in every area of our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Possessing the Land
description:
Taking territories and rising in life come by divine inheritance. The land God has given to us cannot be claimed by human strength, effort, skill or brilliance alone because oppositions and resistances need to be subdued.

In this faith-stirring message, “Possessing the Land,” Pastor Tara teaches how to take possession of lands through the boldness of righteousness, the bulwark of prayer, and the breath of the prophet. He shows us how, through courage, consistent prayer, and prophetic declarations, we subdue obstacles and possess the lands that God has given us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Victory Over Daunting Situations
description:
Sometimes we face challenges that feel overwhelming and impossible to overcome. A key to overcoming such obstacles is earnest, heartfelt, and continuous prayer. In prayer, we release divine power to crush daunting situations and shift events in our favour.

In this powerful message, “Victory Over Daunting Situations,” Pastor Tara shows how prayer releases power that opens our eyes to see God’s possibilities, stirs us up to gather knowledge and understanding for the situations before us, and empowers us to deploy God’s power strategically until we walk in undeniable victory.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents: The Power of Unity
description:
In Christ Jesus, we are guaranteed a life of continuous advancement. To experience this vitally, we must rise above the offences that the enemy will attempt to plant in our hearts, to cause us to shun walking in unity and fellowshipping with other believers.

In this message, “Ascents: The Power of Unity,” Pastor Tara uncovers how being in unity with believers is a divine channel for mighty power and blessings that propel us forward in life. He also teaches six key expressions of unity and six resultant, powerful benefits that position us for unprecedented progress in life.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents: Victory Over Difficulties
description:
In Christ Jesus, we are guaranteed a life of continuous advancement. To experience this vitally, however, we must rise above difficult situations that threaten to challenge our faith in God.

In this message, “Ascents: Victory Over Difficulties,” Pastor Tara teaches how true victory is not found in our own wisdom or strength but in complete dependence on God. Through four practical ways, he shows us how to depend on God, which causes us to rise above trials and walk in victory, no matter the difficulty.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents: The Blessings of a Reverent Man
description:
In Christ Jesus, we have been guaranteed a life of continuous advancement. Experiencing this vitally, however, requires us to rise above the afflictions and pressures that may come when we choose to stand for God uncompromisingly. The key to this rising lies in the blessing God bestows on those who revere Him.

In this message, “Ascents: The Blessings of a Reverent Man,” Pastor Tara uncovers from Psalm 128 how those who revere the Lord are automatically positioned for divine blessings. He walks us through four specific blessings that God bestows upon us, positioning us to enjoy divine preservation, prosperity, fruitfulness, generational impact, and unprecedented victory in life.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prevailing Over Uncertainties
description:
The man in Christ has been redeemed from a life of unpredictability and uncertainties. By redemption, he has been given the authority and spiritual power to turn situations around, ensuring that life works in his favour perpetually.

In this liberating message, “Prevailing Over Uncertainties,” Pastor Tara emphasises the need to wield the spiritual power God has bestowed on us to control and rise above life’s uncertainties. He reveals how prayer, giving and staying under a prophetic covering empower us to prevail and record undeniable success.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Portals of Divine Guidance
description:
Regardless of the challenges that may be before us, our absolute trust is in God. This trust and confidence in His divine guidance shelters us and leads us out of challenges into victory.

In this powerful message, “Portals of Divine Guidance,” Pastor Tara unveils how God’s guidance is our surety in difficult times. He shows us four doorways through which God’s guidance comes and how responding rightly to them positions us for victory and advancement in life.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Desire: The Key to Accomplishment
description:
Desire is God’s built-in system for us to accomplish great things and live purposeful lives on earth. It is a force that positions us to receive from God and walk in the fullness of His plans for us.

In this transformative message, “Desire: The Key to Accomplishment,” Pastor Tara unveils the power of desire as the starting point for every great manifestation. He teaches three spiritual processes that move our desires from being intangible to tangible realities, showing us how to align our hearts with God’s purpose and step boldly into accomplishment.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents: The Unbreakable Oath of David
description:
In Christ Jesus, we are guaranteed a life of continuous advancement. To experience this vitally, we must live with the assurance that no matter the circumstance, God will always be with us and show up for us.

In this message, “Ascents: The Unbreakable Oath of David,” Pastor Tara reveals how God’s unwavering presence empowers us to prosper in every area of life, brings deliverance in times of need, and lifts us to greater heights.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents: Strength for Spiritual Service
description:

In this message, “Ascents: Strength for Spiritual Service,” Pastor Tara shares practical instructions on how to serve God effectively and shows us how effective service through intentionality unlocks God’s unlimited blessings, empowering us to make continuous progress in every area of our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Stretching the Tentacles of Success
description:
Everything God places in our hearts carries the seed of greatness. Therefore, no matter where we are today, there is always a higher level we can rise to. This advancement is only possible when we stretch the boundaries of our success through the power of God.

In this powerful message, “Stretching the Tentacles of Success,” Pastor Tara teaches how we can step into greater dimensions of success through impartation and spiritual practices, as well as receiving the strategic help of men, thereby causing us to experience all that God has prepared for us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Tales of Bethany: The Consecration of the Believer
description:
Consecration is God’s ordained pathway to greatness and prosperity for every believer. By His design, consecration and prosperity are not opposites, but rather two complementary pillars that work together beautifully to produce lasting greatness in our lives.

In this enlightening message, “The Tales of Bethany: The Consecration of the Believer,” Pastor Tara draws powerful lessons from the Biblical city of Bethany, revealing five key principles of consecration that empower us to live effectively and fruitfully on earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Consecration Pathway to Greatness
description:
Consecration does not entail separating ourselves from the world – it is about setting ourselves apart for God. It is a deliberate choice to live in a way that reflects His presence and power in everything we do.

In this enlightening message, “The Consecration Pathway to Greatness,” Pastor Tara unveils how consecration unto God causes the glory of God to radiate in all our endeavours and spheres of influence. He teaches how trusting God and viewing situations through the lens of Christ strengthens our hope even in daunting situations.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Heart of Greatness
description:
The conversations within our hearts speak loudly in the realm of the spirit, and God responds to us according to them. Therefore, cultivating the right heart posture is essential in experiencing greatness powered by God.

In this prophetic message, “The Heart of Greatness,” Pastor Tara reveals three essential heart postures we must cultivate for God to endue us with greatness. He explains how embodying integrity, embracing responsibility, and maintaining a heart free from offence bring honour, ownership, and stirs us to pray — reshaping the atmosphere to work in our favour.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Ascents; Rising from Despair 2

title: The Utterances of God

In this prophetic message, “Crushing the Spirit of Shame,” Pastor Tara uncovers three major ways shame manifests and powerfully shows how believers can be delivered from shame into honour through the power of God and the consciousness of the righteousness we already have in Christ.

title: Conquering Lands by Prophetic Power
description:
By reason of redemption, the believer has been positioned to conquer, take over, and occupy territories for God’s kingdom. The way to execute this takeover and experience dominion, as planned by God, is through prophetic power and utterance.

In this message, “Conquering Lands by Prophetic Power,” Pastor Tara emphasises the need for power in ruling over lands and sectors. He also shows us how to wield this power and utterance to conquer people and places for God.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith for Healing
description:
Having faith for our healing is having an unshaken assurance in what God says about our health in the Bible, even when symptoms persist. It is with this unshaken assurance that we experience healing from sickness in all its forms.

In this life-changing message, “Faith for Healing,” Pastor Tara unveils how to rightly position our faith  not just to receive healing, but to walk in lasting, divine health.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Taking City Gates
description:
God’s desire is that we rise into positions of power and influence for the sake of advancing His Kingdom in our generation. However, stepping into these positions requires strength and courage to confront oppositions that may arise.

In this powerful message, “Taking City Gates,” Pastor Tara reveals three powerful, insightful and practical steps that equip and position us in places of power and influence, causing us to advance the kingdom of God forcefully.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Triumphing by Faith
description:
Faith helps us lay hold on the desires of our hearts, strengthens us to conquer challenges, and causes us to experience miracles.

In this instructive series, “Triumphing by Faith,” Pastor Tara teaches actions we must take in faith to dare what others consider impossible and see the promises of God fulfilled in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Entering into Gates of Righteousness
description:
Righteousness is a pathway that automatically leads to multiple doors of favour, honour and increase. In order to walk in and fully experience these blessings that God has designed for us, there are powerful principles that we must act on.

In this prophetic message, “Entering into Gates of Righteousness,” Pastor Tara shares four enlightening, powerful and practical principles that we can take to fully experience favour, honour and increase in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith in the Anointing
description:
The Bible reveals how the magnitude of miracles recorded during Jesus’ ministry on earth depended on the faith people placed in Jesus’ anointing. This powerful reality remains true today—receiving and believing in the anointing of our spiritual authorities unlocks overflowing miracles in our lives.

In this message, “Faith in the Anointing,” Pastor Tara teaches four practical ways in which we can release our faith in the anointing of God’s servants. These steps cause supernatural results to flow and multiply with ease for us, changing our lives and those around us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Release of Faith
description:
Faith is a powerful force that provokes mighty results. Effectively releasing our faith in God’s word and standing on His promises is, however, an essential precursor to seeing these results manifested.

In this deeply enlightening message, “The Release of Faith,” Pastor Tara unveils three powerful ways to effectively release our faith for visible, undeniable results. He shows us how to engage these to make our faith a potent, active force that produces undeniable proofs in our lives

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Anointing
description:
The anointing is what breaks yokes, releases miracles and brings true liberation. It has the power to completely transform a man’s life — taking him from lack to plenty and from obscurity to prominence.

In this message, “The Anointing,” Pastor Tara reveals how the anointing meets our needs and brings about influence and authority that positions us for greater impact in every sphere of life. He also shows us how to lay hold on the anointing for victories in life.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Mounting Your High Places
description:
It is God’s desire that His children rise, occupy, and take dominion, especially in places of prominence on the earth. Accessing these realms of influence and authority, however, requires divine strength and strategy.

In this powerful message, “Mounting Your High Places,” Pastor Tara draws insights from the lives of five remarkable Bible characters, uncovering how they conquered places of influence — by divine wisdom, strength and strategy — and how, by God’s help, we can do the same.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Multiplied Miracles
description:
God is able to do for us far more than we could ever ask, think, or imagine. Through the supernatural principle of replication and reproduction, what God does for one, He can do for many. Even more, He can orchestrate multiple miracles at once in the life of an individual.

In this message, “Multiplied Miracles,” Pastor Tara reveals how we can steward past miracles and position ourselves to experience them repeatedly, making the miraculous a consistent part of our everyday lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prospering by Righteousness
description:
Righteousness is not just a divine status, it is a pathway to supernatural increase. God desires that we increase spiritually, materially, and emotionally. This kind of prosperity, however, is deeply rooted in righteousness.

In this message, “Prospering by Righteousness,” Pastor Tara reveals how a strong consciousness of the righteous nature we have in Christ, combined with divine direction and the spiritual principles of giving sacrificially to God’s kingdom and prayer, delivers prosperity to us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Forces of the Spirit
description:
There are divine systems through which God’s plans are manifested in our lives. We must fully understand how to engage them deliberately to birth supernatural results according to God’s plan.

In this highly prophetic message, “The Forces of the Spirit,” Pastor Tara unveils four of these divine systems through which we can birth supernatural results. He also shows us how to effectively lay hold on these systems to enforce God’s plans in every area of our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Reigning in Life
description:
Every believer is born and empowered to rule and reign on earth, just like Christ. This is a result of the sacrifice of Jesus that redeemed us from the domain of the devil, made us heirs of all of God’s provisions and promises, and imputed God’s nature of righteousness to us.

In this prophetic message, “Reigning in Life,” Pastor Tara establishes how we, as joint heirs with Christ, are partakers of God’s divine nature, enabling us to rule and exercise dominion. He further outlines how we now have access to God’s power and establishes three ways we can unleash God’s power for results in our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Strength of Faith
description:
Our faith yields more results when it is strong. This strength, which is needed if we are to produce undeniable results, comes when we hinge our expectations and desires in every situation on God’s purposes.

In this deeply enlightening message, “The Strength of Faith,” Pastor Tara unveils four key pillars that strengthen our faith. He further explains how understanding God’s purpose behind what we desire to see in every season strengthens the release of our faith.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Positions of Faith
description:
Faith is unwavering trust and confidence in God, even in seemingly hopeless situations. It  goes beyond seeking what we want and focuses on serving God’s purpose in our lives.

In this prophetic message, “The Positions of Faith,” Pastor Tara highlights four deeply insightful ways to position our  faith. These faith positions birth greater results that cause us to live flourishing and rewarding lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Holding Your Encounters Fast
description:
Spiritual encounters are divine deposits, designed to shift a man’s direction, fuel purpose, and birth undeniable results in life. However, many people lose the potency of their encounters because they fail to hold fast to them and act on them intentionally.

In this deeply enlightening message, “Holding Your Encounters Fast,” Pastor Tara teaches how to maximise your encounters and move from experience to manifestation. He further expounded on three powerful ways to preserve your encounters with actionable steps to continually get lasting results from them.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Riding on the High Places of the Earth
description:
God desires that as His children, we take total dominion of the earth. Hence, as believers, we must hold on to this truth and position ourselves rightly to reign and rule everywhere we find ourselves.

In this prophetic message, “Riding on the High Places of the Earth,” Pastor Tara shows us how the righteousness we have received in Christ has automatically positioned us for dominion and also expounds on four explosive ways to walk in its manifestation in every area of our lives.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Finding the Word of God
description:
The word of God contains everything that we would ever need to live victoriously in life. Finding truths from God’s word and what we do with what we have found would determine how much results we would get with the word.

In this message, “Finding the Word of God,” Pastor Tara reveals an effective way to approach and find the word of God. He also unveils how to wield the truths we find for maximum results.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Transformative Word Encounters
description:
An encounter with God’s word is one of the most powerful encounters a man can have. Hence, it is important that we place the highest value on the revelations we catch from God’s word and allow them to steer the course of our lives.

In this instructive message, “Transformative Word Encounters”, Pastor Tara reveals three distinct types of encounters we can have through God’s Word and how we should approach Scripture to fully lay hold of its life-transforming revelations.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The God of Jacob
description:
God’s supernatural help is real. One of the ways He moves on our behalf and delivers help to us is through the ministry of angels. These angels are sent by God to deliver blessings, breakthroughs, and divine direction.

In this message, “The God of Jacob,” Pastor Tara, using the story of Jacob in the Bible, reveals how intentionally embracing and engaging this dimension of God’s help opens us up to encounters that can launch us into new seasons of favour, growth, and success. He also unveils the nature of God, His faithfulness to His promises, and how cultivating a deep relationship with this covenant-keeping God positions us to access angelic assistance, divine favour, and supernatural upliftment.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Dominating Over Cities
description:
Throughout the Bible, we see how God lifted people like David and Esther into places of honour and authority, positioning them to influence nations according to His will. This is still God’s desire for us today — to plant us in positions of power to dominate sectors, influence decisions, and establish His will on the earth.

In this powerful message, “Dominating Over Cities,” Pastor Tara unveils how God strategically places us in positions of authority, and reveals three profound ways God empowers us to take dominion and fulfill His divine agenda in the places He positions us.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Responding to God’s Favour by the Spirit

God’s favour opens doors to opportunities beyond human understanding. It causes a man to enjoy visibility, elevation, and prosperity, as well as take on new territories.

In this message, “Responding to God’s Favour by the Spirit,” Pastor Tara reveals how to position oneself to receive God’s favour and walk effortlessly in it.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Hand of God
description:
The hand of God is what turns situations around and brings miracles into our hands. Throughout scripture, we see countless accounts of how God’s mighty hand intervened in the lives of people to deliver destiny breakthroughs and triumphs.

In this prophetic message, “The Hand of God”, by Pastor Tara, we see the significance of God’s hand in the affairs of men and how it delivers to us the monumental victories needed for destiny fulfillment.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Findings of Righteousness

Righteousness is a gift that cannot be worked for; it is gotten by faith in the finished works of Jesus Christ. God’s word shows us all that believers begin to enjoy access to when we submit to the righteousness of God.

In this message, “The Findings of Righteousness,” Pastor Tara highlights, using Proverbs 21:21, some of these benefits we have when we put our faith in Christ Jesus and the righteousness God gives us as a result — life, righteousness and honour.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Faith in Jesus for Miracles
description:
The believer can be assured of daily miracles from God because he has put his faith in Jesus. These miracles happen, not by us actively striving to muster up faith in difficult situations, but by leaning more on God’s grace.

Drawing lessons from the story of the woman with the issue of blood and other powerful miracles in the Bible, Pastor Tara reveals how faith is not gotten through hard work. In this message, “Faith in Jesus for Miracles,” He unveils a powerful truth — faith comes by staying conscious of God’s grace.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Multiplying Effect of God’s Blessings

When God created man, He blessed him with dominion and all he needs to reign in life. One of the components of this blessing is the power of multiplication that causes man to increase, expand, and ultimately take over.

In this message, “The Multiplying Effect of God’s Blessings,” Pastor Tara expounds on the virtues God has equipped us with to take over our spheres of influence, subdue opposing forces and fully step into our God-ordained mandate of dominion.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Bringing Power of God
description:
God is able to bring everything we need—without toil or struggle—just as He did for the Israelites in biblical times. These divine provisions come through the working of His mighty hand in our lives.

In this prophetic message, “The Bringing Power of God,” Pastor Tara highlights the different ways God intervenes in our lives — through the power of inheritance, prophecy, and divine help — to bring things to us.

title: Breaking Longstanding Stagnation
description:
God desires that the believer enjoys ever-increasing joy, progress and light. Despite this, some believers still face seasons of stagnation. We can break free from such seasons when we rise up deliberately and take intentional action.

In this message, “Breaking Long-Standing Stagnations,” Pastor Tara reveals five principles for breaking longstanding stagnation, highlighting the role we as believers play in laying hold on breakthroughs and stepping into God’s intended flow of progress and advancement.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: How to Run Faster than the Chariots of the Systems
description:
The believer’s victories in the systems and sectors of the earth are not tied to earthly policies and schemes, but to the power of God. As a result, the believer is always able to outrun and rise above every limitation in the systems designed to cripple people’s destinies and limit God’s plans.

In this prophetic message, “How to Run Faster Than the Chariots of the System,” Pastor Tara unveils the importance of leveraging God’s power to break free from societal limitations. He also reveals four powerful ways to break past the barriers of the systems and walk in unstoppable victory.

title: The Power of Establishment in Righteousness

Believing in Christ Jesus is the only way to righteousness and the abundant blessings that come with it. When we believe in the sacrifice of Jesus for us, we are able to stand before God without fear, guilt or condemnation. This consciousness of our righteousness in Christ also empowers us to walk in dominion and fulfill God’s purpose on earth.

In this message, “The Power of Establishment in Righteousness,” Pastor Tara reveals how righteousness strengthens our faith and keeps us unshakable through all seasons of life. He also reveals three types of fear that lose their hold over us when we are grounded in righteousness.

description:
Jesus Christ defeated sickness and death on the cross, granting us victory over them and liberating us from fear. However, to enjoy this victory completely and utterly humiliate the spirit of death and all its forms in our lives, we must rise and exercise our God-given authority.

Righteousness confers on us, the ability to stand before God, without the feeling of fear, guilt and inferiority. It is not merely a remedy for our past mistakes, it is a new nature that makes us partakers of a divine inheritance in Christ.
