Every believer has been called into a life of superfluous abundance. For the believer to however enjoy this life of abundance vitally, he needs to have and live in the consciousness of the blessing and engage in supernatural practices that cause the environment and systems of the earth to be rearranged in his favour.

In this prophetic message, “Commanding Supernatural Fortune”, the Senior Pastor expounds on the visions of possibilities as a primary component in the believer’s ability to command supernatural fortune – thereby making him a force to be reckoned with on the earth.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Triggers of Destiny
description:
The believer’s life is a confluence of encounters and supernatural practices that lead to constant victory. The place of spiritual verities such as righteousness-consciousness, prayers, sacrifice, teachings, and prophetic utterances in the believer’s walk of victory cannot be overemphasized.

In this Prophetic message, “Triggers of Destiny” the Senior Pastor expounds on the importance of these five principles in the believer’s life, using the life of Jesus and specific records in the Bible as parallels.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Birthing Real Miracles 2
description:
The believer has been called to a life of victory. However, sometimes, he is faced with situations that are completely contrary to God’s promises for him. Through supernatural tools of destiny, these situations can be constantly surmounted thereby causing the believer to enjoy God’s best for him.

In this part of the powerful message, “Birthing Real Miracles”, the Senior Pastor further expounds on revelational light as a tool for a believer’s liberation against death, sickness and delay. With fiery prophetic utterances, he breaks limiting forces and ushers us into a life of victory.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: You are Christ’s Extension 2
description:
The believer is called to spread the influence of God’s kingdom wherever he goes. This requires that he takes on the responsibility of transforming the lives of men within the reach of his influence.

In this powerful teaching, “You are Christ’s Extension”, the Senior Pastor expounds on the power the believer has to change the lives of those around him, especially unbelievers. He explains how the expansion of God’s kingdom is limited on earth if believers don’t take the Gospel to their sectors and reveals how believers can accomplish ministry effectively in their sectors.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: You are Christ’s Extension
description:
The believer is called to spread the influence of God’s kingdom wherever he goes. This requires that he takes on the responsibility of transforming the lives of men within the reach of his influence.

In this powerful teaching, “You are Christ’s Extension”, the Senior Pastor expounds on the power the believer has to change the lives of those around him, especially unbelievers. He explains how the expansion of God’s kingdom is limited on earth if believers don’t take the Gospel to their sectors and reveals how believers can accomplish ministry effectively in their sectors.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Spirit of Faith for Possibilities
description:
Experiencing the possibilities of God is hinged on our believing in God’s word and promises to us. This ability to believe radically can be laid hold on and experienced by receiving impartations of men who have immense faith to believe God in ways that shoot a man past human limitations.

In this powerful message, “The Spirit of Faith for Possibilities” the Senior Pastor shows the place of impartation and honour for the anointed in breaking into the possibilities of God. With clear examples, he reveals how we do not have to live life learning the hard way but can enter into the results and harvests of great men and women of faith who have gone ahead of us.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Birthing Real Miracles
description:
The believer has been called to a life of victory. However, sometimes, he is faced with situations that are completely contrary to God’s promises for him. Through supernatural tools of destiny, these situations can be constantly surmounted thereby causing the believer to enjoy God’s best for him.

In this powerful message, “Birthing Real Miracles”, the Senior Pastor expounds on revelational light as a vital tool in the believer’s experience of continuous victory and miracles in the face of opposing circumstances.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Experiencing God’s Possibilities in a Strong City
description:
The systems of the world are primarily built in ways that constrict many and limit their prosperity. As a result of this, many believers tend to lose consciousness of their righteousness and shrink back in the face of such systems instead of moving forward in boldness.

In this prophetic message, “Experiencing God’s Possibilities in a Strong City”, the Senior Pastor draws parallels between biblical cities and the systems in the world with the same characteristics. He reveals how to live above their holds and experience the possibilities of God and His miracle-working power for dominion in those systems.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breaking the Limitations of Delay
description:
Every believer has been exempted from a life of struggle, disease, stagnancy and delay. However, not many live in the reality of this exemption.

In this powerful message, “Breaking the Limitations of Delay”, the Senior Pastor expounds on the tangibility of the mercy, command and power of God and how the believer can experience their deliverance from delay through them and be made whole.

Download. Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Vitality of Prosperity
description:
Prosperity is every believer’s blood-bought right. To live in the reality of this truth, believers must understand that their cooperation with God to unleash the miraculous in their finances is vital.

In this prophetic message, “The Vitality of Prosperity”, the Senior Pastor expounds on what a believer should do to experience prosperity vitally. He elucidates on five things that, when adhered to, have the power to unlock God’s prosperity plan and promises to us.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Praying Out Possibilities of Prosperity
description:
Prayer is a vital way the believer breaks into graces and gains ascendancy over mammon and resources. Prayer increases his capacity and opens him up to light from God’s word in a way that draws everything he needs to fulfill destiny to him.

In this prophetic message, “Praying Out Possibilities of Prosperity”, the Senior Pastor expounds on how we as believers should pray to command resources with ease and exercise our authority over mammon. He expatiates three types of prayer to engage in for miracles- praying with perspectives, praying prophetically, and praying to release power.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Sacrifice, The Master Key To Financial Possibilities
description:
Sacrifice is the key to the turnaround of a man’s fortune. From Bible times, whenever men and women gave bountifully and sacrificially, they experienced God’s provisions in their lives in astounding ways.

In this prophetic message, “Sacrifice; The Master Key to Financial Possibilities”, the Senior Pastor expounds on the power of sacrifice and how it transforms our lives as believers.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breaking Out of the Hold of the Systems
description:
The systems of this world have been programmed never to give a man power to surpass or subdue them. However, if a believer will enjoy prosperity in those systems, he must break out of their hold.

In this prophetic message, “Breaking Out of the Hold of the System”, the Senior Pastor, using Biblical scenarios, expounds on the different types of systems in the world and the expressions of their limitations in a man’s life. He elucidates how the believer can break out of the hold of the systems and live a victorious life.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Special Forces of Prosperity 4
description:
Prosperity is God’s unrepentant will for His covenant children. A careful study of the scriptures affirms that God actively seeks the abundance and wealth of His people. To activate His promises of prosperity, however, believers must actively and fervently believe His word.

In this fourth part of the powerful message, “Special Forces of Prosperity,” the Senior Pastor further expounds on the significance of utterance in the believer’s prosperity. He elucidates on the place of revelation and power in fueling our utterance, and how we can use this utterance to shape our environment and enter into God’s prosperity plan and promises to us.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Special Forces of Prosperity 3
description:
Prosperity is God’s unrepentant will for His covenant children. A careful study of the scriptures affirms that God actively seeks the abundance and wealth of His people. To activate His promises of prosperity, however, believers must actively and fervently believe His word.

In this third part of the prophetic message ‘Special Forces of Prosperity’, the Senior Pastor explains the importance of utterance in our prosperity and how to wield it to our advantage.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Special Forces of Prosperity 2
description:
Prosperity is God’s unrepentant will for His covenant children. A careful study of the scriptures affirms that God actively seeks the abundance and wealth of His people. To activate His promises on prosperity, however, believers must actively and fervently believe His word.

In this second part teaching of the powerful message, “Special Forces of Prosperity,” the Senior Pastor explains how every blessing is hinged to the sacrifice of Jesus and reveals the place of an unwavering consciousness of righteousness in experiencing kingdom prosperity.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Special Forces of Prosperity
description:
Prosperity is God’s unrepentant will for His covenant children. A careful study of the scriptures affirms that God actively seeks the abundance and wealth of His people. To activate His promises on prosperity, however, believers must actively and fervently believe His word.

In this powerful message “Special Forces of Prosperity”, the Senior Pastor reveals God’s unwavering desire for His children and explains how to claim His promises of prosperity for our lives.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Start There
description:
In God’s kingdom, small acts of faith are able to open mighty doors for us. Just like the woman with the jar of oil in the book of 2 Kings, God works with what we have to guide us to our preordained places of greatness and elevation.

In this prophetic message titled ‘Start There,’ the Senior Pastor imparts wisdom on how we can step out with our resources and experience abundance and progress. With mighty utterance, he declares powerful words to lead us into God’s intended purposes for our lives. Receive wisdom for advancement as you listen to these inspired words.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: David’s Heart; The Secret to a Lifting Walk with God
description:
God desires that all men grow in their walk with Him. This growth causes men to enjoy a transformational and lifting walk with God, and can often be observed by a man’s heart position and his responses to physical situations.

In this instructive message, “David’s Heart: The Secret to a Lifting Walk with God”, the Senior Pastor reveals how having the right heart is key to a man’s lifting. Through the biblical story of David, he outlines three important heart positions that will help you experience perpetual lifting in life.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breaking Out by the Prophetic
description:
Prophecies are God’s tool for directing the believer in destiny and ushering him into new seasons. They however require us to appropriately steward them in order to harvest their power and purpose in our lives.

In this instructive message, “Breaking Out by the Prophetic: How to Handle Prophecies,” the Senior Pastor reveals how we can handle prophecies in order to make them produce maximally in their lives.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Laying Hold on the Prophet
description:
God has set up His prophets as bearers of prosperity, victory and deliverance to His people. They are God’s instrument for guiding the destinies of the believer and ushering in new seasons of his life. Therefore, the believer who will fulfil destiny must learn how to receive from these men and benefit from the anointing of God’s spirit upon them.

In this prophetic message, “Laying Hold on the Prophet,” the Senior Pastor reveals the instrumentality of God’s prophets in God’s plan for our lifting. Drawing from the story of the Shunammite woman, he outlines three important practices that will help you maximise your access to and receive from God’s anointed.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Stepping into Your Large Place
description:
God has ordained that the believer enjoys prosperity without striving and hardship. To ensure this, he orchestrates overturnings and deliverances in the midst of oppositions in the systems of the world to bring the believer into his large place.

In this revelational message, “Stepping into Your Large Place,” the Senior Pastor reveals three important pillars — peace, power and prophetic help — that are pivotal to a believer experiencing ease and prosperity the way God has designed.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Dominion of the Righteousness of Faith
description:
Through the sacrifice of Christ Jesus, God has exalted the believer and made him righteous as He is. By this, the man in Christ has received dominion over darkness, defeat and lack, and the power of the devil has been broken over him.

In this message of redemption, The Visionary reveals how redemption has set the believer for a life of dominion and reiterates the all-important truth: our sins have been forgiven! With great utterance, he unveils how the believer can express this dominion vitally in all his affairs.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Fulfilling Destiny through Heaven’s Possibilities 2
description:
Destiny can only be fulfilled through the instrumentality of God’s help. Every believer needs the intervention of God to propel him forward in the achievement of life’s purpose.

In this second part of the message, Fulfilling Destiny through Heaven’s Possibilities, the Senior Pastor reveals how realising destiny comes from embracing God’s potential, focusing on excelling in whatever your hand finds doing and allowing God to enhance your abilities.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Shaking Nations, Reaping the Earth
description:
God’s purposes for the believer are often delivered by impartation of the graces which He has placed upon His anointed. For example, in scriptures, we see Elisha receive a double portion of Elijah’s anointing. In the same way, every believer can receive grace and enjoy dominion by inheritance and not hard work alone, and as a result, step into the promises of God for them.

In this prophetic message, Shaking Nations, Reaping the Earth, The Visionary teaches how spiritual mantles like wisdom, favour and the ministry of angels can be imparted to us and how we can take advantage of them for the advancement of God’s kingdom and our lifting in life.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Tale of Three Women
description:
By the sacrifice of Jesus, God has guaranteed the believer’s prosperity. Experiencing it vitally and in unfathomable ways, however, is hinged on the believer’s engagement of spiritual practices that are inspired by faith in the grace of God.

In this instructive Heart Enlargement Speciale message, “The Tale of Three Women,” the Senior Pastor reveals three practices — gleaned from the stories of three women in the Bible — that are pivotal to the believer’s experience of kingdom prosperity.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Maximizing God’s Call on Your Life
description:
God empowers and refines the believer to fulfil divine purpose and maximise His call on his life. One of the results of this is success and kingdom influence.

In this instructive message, The Senior Pastor highlights how we can maximise God’s call with power and be refined to take territories for the kingdom of God.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Four Altars of Abraham
description:
The stories of men of the scriptures reveal certain spiritual practices that, when engaged, cause a man to experience the possibilities of heaven in his affairs.

In this Heart Enlargement Speciale message, The Four Altars of Abraham, The Visionary highlights four of such pillars and practices that bring God’s mighty power to bear in seemingly impossible situations of our lives. Drawing from the life of Abraham, he reveals how we can partner with God to experience the possibilities of heaven on earth.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Footprints of Baal Perazim
description:
Sudden turnarounds, amazing restorations and remarkable takeovers characterise the interventions of God in the life of the believer. By these, God crushes problems that seem insurmountable, leaving the believer and the world around him amazed at His goodness.

In this fiery prophetic message, “The Footprints of Baal Perazim”, The Visionary unveils how God delivers miracles to and orchestrates events that are beyond human calculations for believers. With prophetic breath, he releases fiery declarations that will cause you to experience sudden turnarounds,remarkable takeovers and amazing restorations.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Fulfilling Destiny through Heaven’s Possibilities 1
description:
There are many obstacles that arise on a man’s journey to fulfilling destiny. By God’s word and His power the believer can surmount them all and fulfil divine purpose.

In this Heart Enlargement Speciale message, ‘Fulfilling Destiny Through Heaven’s Possibilities”, the Senior Pastor reveals the processes through which God takes the believer to ensure he fulfils destiny. With prophetic utterances, he declares divine orchestrations that will launch you into God’s plans for you.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Receiving the Wonders of God
description:
God is in the business of performing wonders that deliver miracles, breakthroughs and encounters to His children. As He does this, the believer must learn to receive the wonders which He so freely gives.

In this prophetic message, “Receiving the Wonders of God,” the Senior Pastor reveals how God’s wonders are delivered to men and the ways by which the believer can receive them to experience great wonders in life.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Miracles; The Wonders of God
description:
God is in the business of doing the seemingly impossible to bring His children out of difficult situations and circumstances that threaten to overwhelm them. Examples of such in Bible times are the parting of the Red Sea and the sustenance of a family in famine by a jar of flour. Today, it is whatever the believer needs to triumph in any situation.

In this prophetic message, Miracles: The Wonders of God, the Senior Pastor reveals how God turns situations around by the miraculous and he releases prophetic breath to launch you into your miracles.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Sudden Turnarounds by the Anointing
description:
All through Bible times and in our present day, we see that God causes drastic and sudden turnarounds in the lives of His people through the ministry of the anointed. These turnarounds cause the believer to experience what is described in Psalms 126 as the turning of captivity in astonishing ways.

In this transformational message, Sudden Turnarounds by the Anointing, the Senior Pastor unveils the place of the anointed in transforming the lives of God’s people and releases fiery prophetic declarations that will cause you to experience leaps and sudden turnarounds.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit IV
description:
The spirit of God often manifests through men to produce miracles that defy human limitations. When this happens, it is known as the Manifestations of the Spirit. These manifestations are a vehicle for the release of God’s power for men to experience miracles in the order of the impossible.

In this fourth part of the prophetic message, Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit, the Senior Pastor reveals truths about the inspirational gifts of the spirit and teaches how we can run through troops and leap over walls by them.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit III
description:
The spirit of God often manifests through men to produce miracles that defy human limitations. When this happens, it is known as the Manifestations of the Spirit. These manifestations are a vehicle for the release of God’s power for men to experience miracles in the order of the impossible.

In this third part of the prophetic message, Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit, the Senior Pastor continues to reveal truths about the power gifts of the spirit and teaches how we can run through troops and leap over walls by them.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit II
description:
The spirit of God often manifests through men to produce miracles that defy human limitations. When this happens, it is known as the Manifestations of the Spirit. These manifestations are a vehicle for the release of God’s power for men to experience miracles in the order of the impossible.

In this second part of the prophetic message, Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit, the Senior Pastor continues to reveal truths about the revelational gifts of the spirit and teaches how we can run through troops and leap over walls by them.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

description: Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Potency of God’s Power
description:
God’s mighty power is able to accomplish all the believer needs for life; from breaking barriers, to engendering wealth, to silencing opposition and putting him above the limitations the systems of the world place on many.

In this instructionally prophetic message, The Potency of God’s Power, the Senior Pastor reveals how God’s power is typically released through His anointed and the many victories it accomplishes in the lives of believers.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Gates that Command Prosperity
description: Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit
description:
The spirit of God often manifests through men to produce miracles that defy human limitations. When this happens, it is known as the Manifestations of the Spirit. These manifestations are a vehicle for the release of God’s power for men to experience miracles in the order of the impossible.

In this recent message, Leaps by the Manifestations of the Spirit, the Senior Pastor reveals truths about the revelational gifts of the spirit and teaches how we can run through troops and leap over walls by them.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Lifting by Prophetic Instrumentality
description:
God has ordained every believer for lifting in all of their endeavours. One major way He accomplishes this is by the ministry of the Prophet. As God shortens the distance between men and the anointed, they are thrust into new levels of glory and unprecedented abundance by the anointing.

In this recent message, Lifting by Prophetic Instrumentality, the Senior Pastor reveals the lifting possibilities of the power of God and releases mighty words for our takeover in life. Experience lifting as you relive the prophetic breath of this meeting.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: 3 Spiritual Organs of Perception III
description:
Every human system has its limitations – boundaries that seek to restrict many and tell them how far they can go and what is possible for them. However, God, by His wisdom and power is able to move us past these limitations into the places that have been prepared for our glory. This wisdom is revealed to us by His spirit and our lifting and breaking through in life therefore will depend on our perception and how we can receive what the spirit of God reveals to us.

In this final part of the prophetic series, The Three Spiritual Organs of Perception, the Senior Pastor expounds on the essence of our hearts as an instrument of understanding by which we can receive the wisdom of God to break through limitations in the systems.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: 3 Spiritual Organs of Perception II
description:
Every human system has its limitations – boundaries that seek to restrict many and tell them how far they can go and what is possible for them. However, God, by His wisdom and power is able to move us past these limitations into the places that have been prepared for our glory. Our lifting and breaking through in life therefore will depend on our perception and how we can receive what the spirit of God reveals to us.

In this second part of the prophetic series, The Three Spiritual Organs of Perception, the Senior Pastor expounds on the essence of our hearing as an organ by which we can receive the wisdom of God to break through limitations in the systems.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: 3 Spiritual Organs of Perception
description:
Every human system has its limitations – boundaries that seek to restrict many and tell them how far they can go and what is possible for them. However, God, by His wisdom and power is able to move us past these limitations into the places that have been prepared for our glory. Our lifting and breaking through in life therefore will depend on our perception and how we can receive what the spirit of God reveals to us.

In this first part of the prophetic series, 3 Spiritual Organs of Perception, the Senior Pastor expounds on the essence of our sight and vision as an organ by which we can receive the wisdom of God to break through limitations in the systems.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Leaping over Walls
description:
Many times in life, men face great obstacles that confront their advancement. At such moments, many back down and settle into the status quo of their comfort zones, hedged in by the limitations that their environment, their upbringing, and the systems have placed on them. However, by the strength and power of God, we as believers can rise to defy the limitations that hold men down.

In this prophetic message, Leaping over Walls, the Senior Pastor reveals God’s instrumental wisdom for causing the believer to break through and rise above the limitations in the system for the sake of the kingdom. Enjoy the breakthrough power of God to run through troops and leap over walls as he releases utterances for your dominion and promotion in life.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Breakthrough by Angelic Encounters
description:
Many Bible characters enjoyed prophetic and angelic encounters that changed their life’s trajectory. These encounters were God’s system of lifting them into their next level of blessings, opportunities, healing, prosperity and ascendancy.

In this prophetic message, the Senior Pastor expounds on the encounters of some of these Biblical figures with God’s emissaries, and how it lifted them into rulership and dominion. With mighty prophetic utterance, he delivers God’s word to expedite such encounters in our lives and dynamite breakthroughs for us.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prophecies for the New Season
description:
Beloved,

The Lord has declared, through His Prophet, that this is our season of milk and honey.

Expect God’s mercy and grace as the Senior Pastor declares great words to show forth the blessings of the new season. Receive lifting, transformation, abundance and dominion as you meditate on and rejoice in the prophetic breath of these words.

It is a glorious time for you; your family and your sphere of influence.

Be blessed!

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Prospering in the City 2 – 5
description:
God’s will for us is prosperity. He desires that we experience increase and blessing in our endeavours. One of the ways by which we can experience this plan of prosperity is by investing our giftings, potentials and skills diligently and courageously to every work that our hands find doing.

In this continuing part of the message series, Prospering in the City, The Senior Pastor reveals the place of diligence and courage in walking in true prosperity. Be lifted by the prophetic instructions in this teaching. Your testimonies abound in Jesus’ name.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Outworking of Righteousness
description:
One of the greatest truths that the believer can encounter is that of His righteousness in Christ. This truth makes us conscious of the finished works of Christ, the forgiveness of our sins and the boldness and dominion we now have before God and man.

In this recent Supernatural Life Conference, The Outworking of Righteousness, the Senior Pastor unveils the possibilities of God’s grace due to the righteousness of faith which we have. With prophetic breath, he unveils how the truth of our righteousness empowers us to reign on earth.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Silencing the Effects of Strange Voices
description:
Many believers hold great aspirations, potentials and dreams. Yet, trailing them are strange voices that attempt to drown their visions. These voices are of inability, despair, limitations and fear, targeted at stopping men from running with purpose at the dreams God has placed in their heart. God’s will, however, is for us to enjoy dominion and for our feet to be established on the highways of destiny.

Follow the Senior Pastor in this prophetic message as he reveals how we can recognize and silence these strange voices. Be liberated and step into your God-ordained destiny as you receive these great prophetic utterances.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Living in the Miraculous
description:
As believers, we are ordained to live a life of the miraculous for the fulfilment of destiny. Consequently, God releases the supernatural to us for our takeover, so that we can reach heights untold by the orchestration of miracles.

In this recent Supernatural Life Conference message, Living in the Miraculous, the Senior Pastor unveils divine instruments for commanding miracles in our everyday lives. Experience workings of miracles as you relive the prophetic breath from this great meeting.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: The Breakthrough Power of Giving
description:
The Lord’s path for leading men into wealth differs from the ways of the world. While the world focuses on materialism, God makes provisions of power for His people to prosper. To fully lay hold on this provision, the believer must be yielded to giving. He must ‘scatter’ continuously so that he may increase, and he must be liberal so that he may be made fat (Proverbs 11:24)

In this prophetic message, the Senior Pastor shares precious truths on what our seeds can accomplish in our lives. As you listen, receive an impartation of the grace of giving and experience miracles of favour and dominion.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: Trailers of the Takeover
description:
In this year 2023, our year of FORCEFUL ADVANCEMENT, we are instructed by prophecy that the kingdom of God will be extended on earth through the dominion of God’s people in the sectors. As a result, the sectors and nations of the earth will move in the direction of God’s purposes. On the path to the fulfilment of this prophecy, there are signs that signify a man’s imminent takeover and dominion. These signs are TRAILERS OF THE TAKEOVER.

Follow the Senior Pastor in this message as he reveals one of the major trailers that precede a man on his path to the takeover of the systems of this world.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Gathering by Wisdom
description:
The Lord opens doors of great wealth to turn the lives of His people around. We, however, need wisdom from God to gather the resources that He has made available for us by these open doors. This wisdom transforms us, lights up our path and guides us so that we can step into new experiences of wealth.

In this recent message, Gathering by Wisdom, the Senior Pastor provides wisdom to ascend into new levels of prosperity. Receive miracles of supernatural favour and wisdom as you listen.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: The Rise of God’s Princes
description:
The Lord is raising princes in every sphere of life to rule over the affairs of this world. These princes are stakeholders in the place of power who give counsel to kings and provide direction to mountains of influence. They walk in unprecedented grace and reap the systems of the world for the kingdom of God.

In this recent prophetic message, the Senior Pastor shares deep truths and practical wisdom on how to walk in rulership as princes on this earth. As you listen, take your place in the move of God and receive strength to reign in the sectors.

Listen. Share. Be Transformed.

title: The Battle for Your Lifting
description:
The lifting power of God is God’s tool for introducing fruitfulness into the lives of men. By it, God moves men from insignificance into significance. However, on every man’s journey to lifting, there are contentions and obstacles that may arise in order to pull him down and sink him into lowliness. Therefore, we as believers must learn how to wage warfare against spiritual forces that attempt to contend against our lifting.

Follow the Senior Pastor in this powerful teaching series as he shares truths on the spiritual warfare that we must undertake for our lifting in life.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Winning Invisible Battles
description:
Christ has won for us an eternal victory over the devil. However, the devil often seeks ways to undermine this victory in the lives of many believers. He takes advantage of their fears, ignorance, and mistakes, to gain footholds in their lives and destinies.

In this liberating message, The Senior Pastor shares truths about the unseen realm and how war is being constantly waged against the believer. Learn how to wield your authority in Christ to disarm the attacks of the devil and live a life of continuous victory.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Led to Rule
description:
The believer is born to rule over mountains of influence for God’s glory. To experience this rulership and dominion, however, we must receive practical wisdom by the leadings of God’s Spirit. This timely wisdom changes our seasons, and helps us break past limitations.

Follow The Senior Pastor in this timely message as he reveals precious ways by which believers can access and enjoy the leadings of God’s Spirit for rulership and dominion.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Knowing the Leadings of the Spirit
description:
The spirit of man is the candle of the Lord. This means that our spirit is an important way by which God leads us as believers. This leading is a key privilege which we can enjoy as sons of God.

In this recent message, The Senior Pastor reveals the importance of God’s leadings in the life of the believer. He expounds on various vital ways by which the Lord leads us in our everyday lives to bring us into consistent victory in our endeavours.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Compression of Time
description:
Time is often used as a measure of a man’s progress in life. However, it too easily becomes the believer’s limitation to receiving miracles of destiny. Many believe that they have lost time, or that they are too young or old to receive God’s big plans for them. To fulfil destiny therefore, believers must gain command over the forces of time and receive multiple victories in short spans of time.

In this recent message, Compression of Time, The Senior Pastor unveils the forces of the spirit that aid compression of time. With strong utterance, he releases prophetic words to restore lost time and deliver victories to you that are outside normal human timing. Be liberated and step into destiny as you receive and rejoice in these words of power.

Listen. Share. Be transformed.

title: Encounters that Change the Heart

In this teaching article, follow the Senior Pastor as he reveals the spiritual instruments by which we can receive the encounters of power that change the heart. Expect to be ushered into a new season of blessings as you receive these prophetic instructions.
